title: SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 OUT

detail.title: SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: State Selection Board Odisha has released the SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 for B.Ed, B.H.Ed and M.Ed Admission Test. Check complete exam schedule, hall ticket dates, and download the official notification PDF at ssbodisha.ac.in.

content.text: State Selection Board (SSB) Odisha has officially released the SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 for B.Ed., B.H.Ed. and M.Ed. Admission Test. The entrance examinations are scheduled to be conducted in the last week of May and first week of June 2026. Students can check the complete exam schedule on the official website www.ssbodisha.ac.in. Hall tickets will be available for download from 27.05.2026 onwards.
Candidates who have applied for B.Ed (Arts & Science), B.H.Ed (Hindi) and M.Ed courses can now plan their preparation according to the official SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026.
Direct Link to Download SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 Here

links.text: Direct Link to Download SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 Here

content.text: The State Selection Board, Odisha has announced the complete examination schedule for B.Ed, B.H.Ed and M.Ed Admission Test 2026. This notification brings clarity to thousands of aspirants preparing for teacher education programmes in Odisha.

sections.heading: SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: SSB Odisha has released the detailed exam schedule for different courses under the 2026 admission test. The dates are fixed for B.Ed, B.H.Ed (Hindi) and M.Ed entrance examinations. Candidates can now prepare their revision strategy according to the official SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026.
The B.Ed exam will be conducted for Arts and Science streams together while B.H.Ed is specifically for Hindi medium and M.Ed is for postgraduate level teacher education.

sections.heading: How to Download SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the official SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 notification from the State Selection Board website. Here is a simple step-by-step guide to access the complete schedule.

items: Visit the official website of State Selection Board Odisha at www.ssbodisha.ac.in.
Look for the "Notice" or "Examination" section on the homepage.
Find the link titled "B.Ed., B.H.Ed. and M.Ed. Admission Test, 2026" or "Exam Schedule 2026".
Click on the link to open the official notification PDF.
The complete exam dates and timings will be displayed on your screen.
Click the download button to save the PDF for future reference.
Take a printout of the schedule for better preparation planning.

content.text: Tip: Always refer to the official timetable and keep a copy handy for your exam preparation.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026

content.text: The official SSB Odisha Exam Date 2026 notice contains all essential information regarding the upcoming admission tests. Here are the key details mentioned in the notification:

items: Examination Name: B.Ed., B.H.Ed. and M.Ed. Admission Test 2026
Conducting Body: State Selection Board, Odisha
B.Ed Exam Date: 31 May 2026 (Sunday)
B.H.Ed Exam Date: 03 June 2026 (Wednesday)
M.Ed Exam Date: 03 June 2026 (Wednesday)
Exam Timings: Morning and Afternoon sessions as per course
Hall Ticket Download: From 27 May 2026 (11:00 AM onwards)
Official Website: www.ssbodisha.ac.in

content.text: Note: State Selection Board, Odisha reserves the right to change the dates. Any changes will be notified through newspapers and the official website.
Official Link: Download SSB Odisha Exam Notice 2026 PDF

links.text: Download SSB Odisha Exam Notice 2026 PDF
